title: wolfhsm-sys crate
description: Add wolfhsm-sys workspace crate providing raw FFI bindings to wolfHSM (via bindgen over wrapper.h) plus C shims for opaque key structs. Build script pulls DEP_WOLFCRYPT_SYS_* metadata, propagates wolfSSL paths to wolfhsm-src, links wolfhsm + wolfhsm_shims static libs. Allowlist: wh_.*/WH_.*/posix_transport_.* types, wh_Client_.* functions, WH_.* constants. shims.c provides stack-allocated wrappers for ECC, Curve25519, RSA, ML-DSA, AES-GCM, SHA-256, CMAC where key structs are zero-sized in generated bindings.
